summary.quantification_method: Label-free area under the curve quantification

primary_variables.matched_definition: Permanent loss of function through full gene knockout (for example CRISPR KO or deletion).
evidence: we deleted CHD1 via CRISPR in the LNCaP line (sgCHD1) and validated complete loss of CHD1 protein
Crosslinked chromatin bound protein complexes were immunopurified, digested, and analyzed by mass spectrometry to identify and quantify proteins associate with the chromodomain helicase (Chd1).
we deleted CHD1 via CRISPR in the LNCaP line (sgCHD1)

replicate_hints: Two independent biological replicates were processed for each IP
multiplex_channel_hints: Label-free area under the curve quantification

evidence: the chromatin-bound interactome of CHD1 was defined using Rapid Immunoprecipitation and Mass-spectrometry of Endogenous Peptides (RIME), with the interactome of H4K4me3 used as a promoter-specific control.
the log signal to noise ratios (S/N) from IgG samples were subtracted from each IP condition

quantification_strategy: Label-free area under the curve quantification

targets_and_enrichments.ontology_label: Affinity purification coupled with mass spectrometry proteomics

base_candidates_ranked.reason: The PRIDE metadata explicitly states 'MS1 intensity based label-free quantification method' and the methods section describes a 'Top20 method' (DDA) on an Orbitrap Fusion.

modifier_candidates_ranked.reason: The experiment is explicitly identified as RIME (Rapid Immunoprecipitation and Mass-spectrometry of Endogenous Peptides) in both the title, methods, and PRIDE metadata.

trigger_keywords: label-free area under the curve quantification
